rules: artifact_versions source requires non-empty artifact_version_ids and null session_id
legacy_session source requires non-empty session_id and empty artifact_ids and artifact_version_ids
artifact_ids and artifact_version_ids have a one-to-one positional correspondence
every artifact_ref version ID must be present in source_artifact_version_ids for artifact_versions source
source_revision and package_fingerprint are immutable snapshot identifiers
new application-center handoffs cannot use legacy_session
